title: Onkos: a curated, tier-annotated dataset of tumor-growth-inhibition and TGI-to-survival models
description: Onkos is a curated, citation-backed, machine-readable dataset of the tumor-growth-inhibition (TGI) models, exposure-response links, TGI-metric to survival models, preclinical-translation (Simeoni) models, and hypothesis-tier tumor-immune QSP models that oncology drug development depends on. Every record carries an explicit confidence tier, its derivation context, its validated transportability boundary, the inter-individual variability on its high-uncertainty terms, and its external-validation performance, and exports into NONMEM, SBML, PharmML, nlmixr2/rxode2, and Pumas. NOT a prognostic tool and NOT a treatment recommender; for research, drug-development methodology, and education only.
